{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord body
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has the grace of an [[Underlord body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Underlord body]] prevented his knees from buckling.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
